case_title: CROSSCHECK INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JOSEPH E PETRILLO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSSCHECK INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETRILLO, JOSEPH E INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH E. PETRILLO ESQ., $6,569.79 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,569.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
